data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing choices to reduce decision time, increasing user efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined user interface with concise options.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Ensuring adaptable design to accommodate the cognitive limits of users.
data.technical_spec: Chunking information to improve user retention and recall.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Making functions intuitive by aligning with user expectations from other apps.
data.technical_spec: Adopting familiar iconography and navigation patterns.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing touch target sizes and placement for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Larger touch targets and strategic placement in high-frequency areas.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhancing satisfaction and perceived usability through appealing design.
data.technical_spec: Balanced color schemes and minimalistic design approach.
